minor.comment: Initial release: typed devtools message union, versioned handshake, RFC-6902 patch utilities, and a transport-agnostic reconnecting WebSocket client with backpressure signaling.

patch.comment: computePatches and patchesFromChange now escape JSON Pointer segments per RFC 6902 (~ becomes ~0 and / becomes ~1), so a state key containing / or ~ produces a valid pointer. A key containing a literal . still cannot be represented by a dotted path (documented limitation).
